creator: andrew@scoop.co.nz
text:
The URL in /usr/ports/www/mod_auth_cookie_mysql2/pkg-descr is broken.  It sould now be http://home.digithi.de/digithi/dev/mod_auth_cookie_mysql/

Fix: Use the editor of your choice, or if it's easier, run the patch:
How-To-Repeat: 
View the file, follow the link, futz around with google to find a better link, and fill out a send-pr form.
